background: The highest-ranked synthetic gap leaves retry semantics below the target API correctness bar.
description: Specify and test partial-write replay behavior for mutation endpoints.
doneCriterion: The API contract and retry tests describe duplicate, replayed, and partial-write idempotency outcomes.
expectedValue: Callers and agents can verify retry behavior without inferring undocumented recovery semantics.
title: Tighten the idempotency replay contract
